title: Excalibur | Dungeons And Combat Support
description: A non official compatibility pack between Excalibur and DNC
body:
Its a work in progress , See Gallery for some previews.



Best Used with Excalibur

And Requires Dungeons And Combat



Full to-do list of what ive done so far:

Blocks: Complete.
GUI's: Complete.
Mobs: Kamath's army , remnants , ernos, sandstone golem and fractured vex.
Items: Mostly done, only about a dozen are still incomplete.
Armors: Iron , diamond, gold, netherite, bronze, sandstone and copper.
Weapons: Same as armors+ the weapons kamath's army uses.
Status effects: Broken armors, Sword enhancements and antidote.

 
Credits:

The creators of Excalibur and Dungeons and Combat, Obv.
Stone Bricks and Mossy Stone Bricks are made by oni7suKa and i have premission to use it.
Music Discs "Sunleia" and "Kamath" [Added from 5.4+] are made and sent to me by TC_. He also inspired/donated many armor textures.

Thanks to their work this project is more polished.❤️
